result:
Now I have a comprehensive picture. Here's the complete end-to-end order creation flow:

---

## Complete Order Creation Flow (POS → DB → Async Jobs)

### Phase 1: HTTP Entry Point

**Route:** `POST /v1/merchant/{storeID}/order`
- **File:** `app/Http/routes.php:636`
- **Controller:** `OrderController@postOrd`
- **File:** `app/Http/Controllers/OrderController.php:514`

### Phase 2: Controller Pre-Processing (`postOrd`)

| Step | What | Line |
|------|------|------|
| 1 | Validate JSON body | `:526` |
| 2 | Validate storeID (URL vs header match) | `:534` |
| 3 | Validate chain-store relationship (DB lookup on `listOfStores`) | `:549` |
| 4 | APK version check | `:631` |
| 5 | EasyEcom invoice generation (if PI + EasyEcom enabled) | `:576` |
| 6 | Unicommerce sales order creation (if PI + Unicommerce enabled) | `:649` |
| 7 | Stock release for PI-held inventory (if `allocateStockForPI` + `enableStockLedger`) | `:705` via `InventoryController@stockTransaction` |
| 8 | **Call `Order::postOrder($storeID, $data)`** | `:741` |

### Phase 3: Core Order Processing (`Order::postOrder`)

**File:** `app/Order.php:7915` (this is a ~5000+ line method)

| Step | Method/Logic | Line |
|------|-------------|------|
| 1 | Validate orderID exists in payload | `:7918` |
| 2 | Resolve chainID (from data or DB via `getChainID()`) | `:7925` |
| 3 | Set timezone | `:7933` |
| 4 | **Initialize 50+ table references** (store-level, chain-level, global) | `:7940–7997` |
| 5 | Parking module validation (if enabled) | `:8009` |
| 6 | Fiscal year / device sync validation | `:8054` |
| 7 | Order prefix validation | `:8108` |
| 8 | Load chain settings (credit notes, modifiers, tokens, stock ledger, etc.) | `:8038–8155` |
| 9 | **`orderCheck()`** — basic order validation | `:8163` (`Order.php:2105`) |
| 10 | **`checkOrderIdExists()`** — duplicate detection + auto-fix logic | `:8185` (`Order.php:2118`) |
| 11 | Online billing / PI fulfillment validation | `:8241` |
| 12 | UrbanPiper channel ID resolution from PI | `:8272` |
| 13 | Mandate tax validation per product | `:8291` |
| 14 | Activate products in catalogue | `:8311` |
| 15 | Customer address normalization | `:8321` |
| 16 | Rwanda RRA fiscal integration (if enabled) | `:8344` |
| 17 | **`createOrderDetail()`** — insert into `{storeID}_orderDetail` + `{chainID}_orderDetail` | (`Order.php:5242`) |
| 18 | **`createOrderSummary()`** — insert into `{storeID}_orderSummary` + `{chainID}_orderSummary` | (`Order.php:4724`) |
| 19 | **`createOrderAccounting()`** — insert into `{storeID}_orderAccounting` + `{chainID}_orderAccounting` | (`Order.php:4714`) |
| 20 | **`createOrderModifiers()`** — insert into `{storeID}_orderModifiers` + `{chainID}_orderModifiers` | (`Order.php:2380`) |
| 21 | **`insertOrderCombo()`** — insert into `{storeID}_orderComboProducts` + `{chainID}_orderComboProducts` | (`Order.php:2408`) |
| 22 | Insert payment records into `orderPayments` tables |
| 23 | Update PI status (mark `fulfilledOrderID`) |
| 24 | Customer creation/update + loyalty points (ledger, credit notes, memberships) |
| 25 | KOT detail insertion (for restaurant industry) |
| 26 | Batch/variant stock quantity tracking |
| 27 | Invoice number generation (if `generateInvoiceNumberFromServer`) |
| 28 | Chain-level sales invoice recording (if `recordChainLevelSalesInvoice`) |
| 29 | Return response array with `orderCreationReport`, `orderSummary`, `orderPayment`, `updateQuantity`, etc. |

### Phase 4: Post-Order Job Dispatch (back in `postOrd`)

After `Order::postOrder()` returns successfully (`status === "Created"`), the controller dispatches **up to 20+ async jobs** conditionally:

| Job Class | File | Condition | Queue | Delay |
|-----------|------|-----------|-------|-------|
| `OrderRequestTrackerJob` | `app/Jobs/OrderRequestTrackerJob.php` | Always | `global` | 0 |
| `StockJob` | `app/Jobs/StockJob.php` | Inventory managed + no stock ledger | `{chainQueue}` | 0 |
| `loyaltyPointAdjustmentJob` | `app/Jobs/loyaltyPointAdjustmentJob.php` | CRM earnPointType=PRODUCT | `{chainQueue}` | 3s |
| `SalesTargetJob` | `app/Jobs/SalesTargetJob.php` | `enableSalesTarget` | `{chainQueue}` | 6s |
| `NavisionNewSalesJob` | `app/Jobs/NavisionNewSalesJob.php` | `enableNavisionIntegration` | `{chainQueue}` | 6s |
| `IRDSalesDataJob` | `app/Jobs/IRDSalesDataJob.php` | `enableIRDIntegration` | `{chainQueue}` | 6s |
| `SendEPOSOrderJob` | `app/Jobs/SendEPOSOrderJob.php` | `pushDataToEpos` | `{chainQueue}` | 8s |
| `ZOHOCreataeSalesOrderInvoiceJob` | `app/Jobs/ZOHOCreataeSalesOrderInvoiceJob.php` | `enableZohoIntegration` + PI | `{chainQueue}` | 6s |
| `ZOHOCreataeInvoiceJob` | `app/Jobs/ZOHOCreataeInvoiceJob.php` | `enableZohoIntegration` + no PI | `{chainQueue}` | 6s |
| `UnicommerceCreateSaleOrderJob` | `app/Jobs/UnicommerceCreateSaleOrderJob.php` | `enableUnicommerceIntegration` | `{chainQueue}` | 0 |
| `EasyEcomSaleOrderJob` | `app/Jobs/EasyEcomSaleOrderJob.php` | `enableEasyEcomIntegration` + no PI | `{chainQueue}` | 0 |
| `SendEasyRewardzOrderLog` | `app/Jobs/SendEasyRewardzOrderLog.php` | `enableEasyRewardz` | `{chainQueue}` | 0 |
| `SendNectorOrderLog` | `app/Jobs/SendNectorOrderLog.php` | `enableNectorIntegration` | `{chainQueue}` | 0 |
| `ChainAccountingJob` | `app/Jobs/ChainAccountingJob.php` | `enableAccounting` | `{chainQueue}` | 9s |
| `SendOrderReceiptJob` | `app/Jobs/SendOrderReceiptJob.php` | `sendInvoiceSMS/WA Automatically` | `customer` | 5s |
| `SendInvoiceJob` | `app/Jobs/SendInvoiceJob.php` | `sendInvoiceAutomatically` + email | `customer` | 9s |
| `stockAuditJob` | `app/Jobs/stockAuditJob.php` | `enableStockAudit` | `{chainQueue}` | 12s |
| `MySquareOrderDispatchJob` | `app/Jobs/MySquareOrderDispatchJob.php` | `enableMysquareIntegration` | `{chainQueue}` | 5s |
| `GlobalOrderJob` | `app/Jobs/GlobalOrderJob.php` | Always (non-trial) | `global` | 15s |
| `PladaLoyaltyJob` | `app/Jobs/PladaLoyaltyJob.php` | loyalty=226 | `{chainQueue}` | 15s |
| `QBLoyaltyJob` | `app/Jobs/QBLoyaltyJob.php` | loyalty=225 | `{chainQueue}` | 12s |
| `SendOrderToReviuerJob` | `app/Jobs/SendOrderToReviuerJob.php` | Reviuer configured | `{chainQueue}` | 12s |
| `GlobalEcomInvoiceJob` | `app/Jobs/GlobalEcomInvoiceJob.php` | Online order PI | `global` | 10s |
| `mobiquestOrderIntegrationJob` | `app/Jobs/mobiquestOrderIntegrationJob.php` | `enableMobiquestIntegration` | `{chainQueue}` | 0 |
| `customerOrderDetailWebhookJob` | `app/Jobs/customerOrderDetailWebhookJob.php` | Webhook configured | `customer` | 0 |
| `BharuwaOrderJob` | `app/Jobs/BharuwaOrderJob.php` | `enableBharuwaIntegration` | `{chainQueue}` | 0 |
| `PinelabsDigitalInvoiceJob` | (Pine Labs digital invoice) | Pine Labs configured + store enabled | `customer` | 0 |

### Phase 5: Credit Settlement (inline, not async)

If payment type is `PAYMENT_CREDIT`, the controller calls `Order::creditSettlement()` (`Order.php`) synchronously before the async jobs.

### Phase 6: HTTP Response

- **201** — order created successfully, returns full order object with job references
- **202** — order already exists (duplicate orderID)
- **422** — validation failure (invalid JSON, store mismatch, fiscal sync required, etc.)

### Key Supporting Files

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `app/Order.php` | Core model — all order DB operations (~25K lines) |
| `app/Order2.php` | Secondary order model (last order ID checks) |
| `app/Http/Controllers/OrderController.php` | Controller — validation, orchestration, job dispatch |
| `app/Constants.php` | Table name resolution (`getTableName`, `getChainTableName`, `getGlobalTableName`) |
| `app/Standards.php` | Chain settings lookups (`checkChainSettings`, `getIfChainInventoryManaged`) |
| `app/Services/OrderSyncFailureService.php` | Logs order sync failures |
| `app/Services/OrderDeletionService.php` | Order deletion queries |
| `app/helpers.php` | Utility functions (`isJson`, `convertToArray`, `queueNumber`, `getAllChainSettings`) |
| `app/Jobs/GlobalOrderJob.php` | Posts order to global tables via `Order::postGlobalOrder()` |
| `cloud_schema/store.sql` | Schema for `orderDetail`, `orderSummary`, `orderAccounting`, `orderPayments` |
| `cloud_schema/chain.sql` | Schema for chain-level order tables |

### Database Tables Written (per order)

**Store-level** (`{storeID}_*`): `orderDetail`, `orderSummary`, `orderAccounting`, `orderPayments`, `orderModifiers`, `orderComboProducts`, `customerAccount`, `kotDetail`, `kotVoidDetail`

**Chain-level** (`{chainID}_*`): `orderDetail`, `orderSummary`, `orderAccounting`, `orderPayments`, `orderModifiers`, `orderComboProducts`, `orderBatchDetail`, `creditNoteValidationLogs`, `creditPaymentSummary`, `loyaltyPointsLedger`, `membershipPurchaseSummary`, `membershipPurchaseDetail`, `membershipTracker`, `invoiceSummary`, `invoiceDetail`, `invoicePayments`, `PISummary` (update), `customers` (upsert)

**Global**: `globalEcomOrderSummary` (for online orders)
